properties.title: 斯昆
properties.description:
边境地带的主要城镇之一，位于狭窄的峡谷中。它坐落在舍克王国首都阿德马格的东面。舍克王国拥有这个定居点的管辖权。

*设施:*

- 武器店
- 护甲店
- 旅行装备店
- (2) 酒吧
- 警察瞭望塔

出售建筑
- (2) 倒塌的长屋
  [c 7,200]

- (2) 长屋 [c 19,200]

注意:

沙尘强盗和饥饿强盗在这个地区游荡，会骚扰任何遇到的人。

properties.title: 圣矿
properties.description:
这些是在神圣国度高级监察官监督下的采矿作业，使用奴隶劳动。

可以使用光荣神圣地图来找到这些位置。

神圣哨兵和圣骑士担任守卫和奴隶主，注意任何在该区域附近昏倒并被哨兵或圣骑士发现的人都会被强制成为奴隶为他们工作。

properties.title: 蜂巢村庄
properties.description:
Hive Village is a place controlled by the Western Hive. 
There are 5 villages located in Vain as well as three in Dreg.

Hive Villagers don't trade with the players hive characters because they are considered hiveless, other than that you can trade with hive villagers. Hive Traders will not trade with you if they found out that there is a hiveless character on your squad.

Buildings: 
 - Hive Robotics Shop
 - Hive Trader
 - Hive Residential
 - Factory

properties.title: 蜂巢村庄
properties.description:
蜂巢村庄是由西方蜂巢控制的地方。
在荒原有5个村庄，在德雷格有3个村庄。

蜂巢村民不会与玩家的蜂巢角色交易，因为他们被视为无蜂巢者，除此之外你可以与蜂巢村民交易。如果蜂巢商人发现你的小队中有无蜂巢角色，他们将不会与你交易。

properties.description:

properties.title: 边境区
properties.description:
The Border Zone is where some Game Starts will start out on the current version of Kenshi. It occupies the region of the map south of Okran's Pride and east of Vain. It serves as a no-mans-land between the Shek Kingdom and the Holy Nation.

Spawns include: Dust Bandits, Starving Bandits, Slave Hunters, Escaped Servants, Garuu, Bonedogs, Nomads, and Wandering Assassins.

properties.title: 失落图书馆
properties.description:
失落图书馆是古代知识的储藏库，任其发霉腐朽，不要与图书馆废墟混淆。勇敢的冒险者偶尔能在这些被遗忘的宝库中找到古代科学书籍。

这些地点通常包含揭示其他古代地点的地图，如古代军事基地。

它们有时会被大群血蜘蛛保护着。

properties.title: 虚幻
properties.description:
Vain is a zone that occupies the west coast and red river of the middle section of Kenshi. It displays incredible biodiversity and what looks like refuge to the naive eye, but is in reality one of the most dangerous locations to start off.

Spawns include: Gorillos, Holy Nation Outlaws, Bonedogs, Garru, Wild Bulls, and Western Hive Merchant Caravans.

properties.title: 新克拉利亚
properties.description:
新克拉利亚是敌对派系克拉尔之选的总部，位于阿德马格南部。

这个前哨站被大约15-20名敌对的克拉尔之选角色占据。你可以在这里找到首领飞牛，他的赏金为30,000猫币。

properties.title: 伟大的堡垒
properties.description:
The Great Fortress is an outpost own by the Shek Kingdom.

Despite having the term "great" in its name, the numerous damaged buildings give it a very different appearance. Only two functional buildings in this location, Police Station and one Faction Headquarters.

You can turn in the leader of the Kral's Chosen, Flying Bull to the Police Station cause the Outpost is close to New Kralia.

properties.title: 斯滕沙漠
properties.description:
谢克族敌对的故土，斯滕沙漠。
西面、北面和东北面被维恩包围；东面与边境地带接壤。
在沙漠中巡逻的是由百人守卫率领的谢克战士，还有由飞牛率领的臭名昭著的克拉尔精选部队。

properties.title: 流放者营地
properties.description:
Exile Camp is located at the south of the Stenn Desert Waystation. The only location controlled by the Band of Bones. Notable residents include Tora the Fearless(Bounty 10,000 cats).
If the camp is approached by player, a single exile will chase the player away.
You can find camp beds, tents and MKIII training dummies inside the settlement.

properties.title: 边境区的驿站
properties.description:
Waystation is situated in the easternmost area of the Borderlands. Waystation is managed by the Tech Hunters and Mercenary Guild members.

The outpost has a Bar, General Supplies Shop, and a Robotic Workshop. Recruits can be found at the bar.

properties.title: 谢克遗迹
properties.description:
谢克废墟是繁荣的谢克王国过往的遗迹。它位于阿德马格城的东部。

坐落在岩石山丘的顶部，建筑包括2座瞭望塔、1座L型房屋、1座虫屋、1座蜗牛屋和1座Y型房屋。

properties.title: 阿德马格
properties.description:
阿德马格是谢克王国的首都。阿德马格位于山顶，只有一个入口。坐落在斯滕沙漠地区，这里是百人守卫队及其领袖石魔像埃斯塔塔的家园。

功能建筑包括派系总部、杂货店、护甲店、2个酒吧、3个警察局、忍者盗贼瞭望塔、旅行装备店和武器店。

properties.title: 倒塌之塔
properties.description: 倒塌的塔楼是年久失修的瞭望塔，通常倒在地上。这更像是一个地标性废墟，因为无法进入，周围也没有任何可掠夺的物品。这个地方除了背景美学外似乎没有任何用途。在斯滕沙漠、利维坦海岸和阿拉克各有一座。

properties.title: 中继站
properties.description: 驿站由科技猎人和雇佣兵公会成员管理。总共有四个，以及两个驿站废墟。所有驿站地点都有可能成为自由寻者游戏开始的初始城镇。

properties.title: 小型定居点
properties.description: 微小定居点是位于边境地带东部山顶的一个小废墟。它曾经属于神圣国度，但现在没有居民或功能性建筑。这里有三座废弃建筑，你可以在其中搜刮建筑材料、铁板、燃料和一些不太有用的物品。另一座建筑里有一些武器（剑类）。

properties.title: 尘埃王塔
properties.description: The famed Dust King's residence, the Dust King Tower, is situated in the Border Zone. Level 3 walls, a gate, and five mounted crossbows on the walls make up the defense. Defenders can include a Dust Boss and up to twenty or more dust bandits. Inside the tower on the jail floor is where you can find Unique Recruit Cat.

properties.title: 忍者塔
properties.description:
The Tower of Ninjas is the home of the Black Dragon Ninjas. It is located in the northeast region of the Border Zone. Black Dragon Ninjas are very hostile once you enter the tower they will attack. 

You will find Dimak and Buzan, the leaders of the faction on the tower. Both are wanted by the Holy Nation with 20,000 cat price on each of them. Dimak uses a Meitou quality Ninja Blade.

properties.title: 圣矿
properties.description:
神圣矿山是位于神圣国度领土内的一群小型前哨站。由神圣国度的高级监督官领导，这些是使用奴隶劳动的采矿企业。

神圣矿山由神圣哨兵和圣骑士保护。他们同时也担任这些采矿作业的奴隶监工。

*注意：如果你的队伍中有任何成员在这些区域被发现昏迷，他们将被奴隶贩子俘获并被迫成为奴隶。*

properties.title: 坏牙镇
properties.description:
坏牙镇是一个主要城镇，守卫着奥克兰之傲的肥沃山谷和剥皮者漫游的敌对荒野之间的山口。

功能性建筑和商店包括军械库、盔甲店、面包房、3家酒吧、2个军营、综合仓储建筑、机械店、发电站和武器店。

出售的建筑：
 - 倒塌的长屋
 - 两间小屋

properties.title: 圣农场
properties.description: Holy Farms are a series of minor outposts of Greenlanders located in the Holy Nation territory. These farms produce food and goods for the Holy Nation.

properties.title: 圣农场
properties.description: Holy Farms are a series of minor outposts of Greenlanders located in the Holy Nation territory. These farms produce food and goods for the Holy Nation.

properties.title: 圣农场
properties.description: Holy Farms are a series of minor outposts of Greenlanders located in the Holy Nation territory. These farms produce food and goods for the Holy Nation.

properties.title: 水泡山
properties.description:
Blister Hill is a large city and the capital of the Holy Nation. You can find Holy Lord Phoenix here inside his own throne room and guards known as Protectors of the Flame. 

Functional Buildings and shops include, Armory, Armour Shop, Bakery, 3 Bars, 2 Barracks, a Clothes Shop, a General Storage building, Headgear Shop, a Materials Storage Building, Mechanical Shop, Police Station, Power Station and a Weapon Shop.

properties.title: 圣矿
properties.description:
圣矿是位于圣国领土内的一组小型前哨站。由圣国的高级监督者领导，这些是使用奴隶劳动力的采矿企业。

圣矿由圣哨兵和圣骑士保护。它们也兼作这些采矿作业的奴隶主。

*注意：如果你的队员在这些区域内被发现昏迷，他们将会被奴隶贩子捕获并被迫成为奴隶。*

properties.title: 斯金纳漫游
properties.description:
Skinner's Roam is a rocky desert territory controlled by the Holy Nation. Unlike other region's controlled by Holy Nation this is the most least guarded/patrolled.

Lack of security from the Holy Nation allows hungry bandits to harass wanderers.

Spawns: Starving Bandits, Wild Bulls, Escaped Servants and Bonedogs.

properties.title: 圣农场
properties.description: 圣农场是位于圣国领土的一系列绿地人的小型前哨站。这些农场为圣国生产食物和货物。

properties.title: 神圣矿坑遗迹
properties.description: 圣矿遗迹是一个归圣国所有的古代遗址。这个遗迹没有任何居民。

properties.title: 神圣矿坑遗迹
properties.description: 圣矿遗迹是一个归圣国所有的古代遗址。这个遗迹没有任何居民。

properties.title: 重生
properties.description:
重生镇是圣国拥有的最大奴隶城镇。圣国将所有堕落的存在送到这里，以便他们能够转世为人类。而骷髅则不会在这里被奴役，因为他们认为骷髅没有灵魂。

你可以在这里将角色卖给奴隶贩子。你也可以通过撬锁解开镣铐来解救被奴役的角色。

properties.title: 失落图书馆
properties.description:
失落图书馆是古代知识的储藏库，任其发霉腐朽，不要与图书馆废墟混淆。勇敢的冒险者偶尔能在这些被遗忘的宝库中找到古代科学书籍。

这些地点通常包含揭示其他古代地点的地图，如古代军事基地。

它们有时会被大群血蜘蛛保护着。

properties.title: 浮渣安全屋
properties.description: Flotsam Safehouse is a single building located to the north of Rebirth. This location is a safe haven for escaped Rebirth Slaves to rest and recover their strength as stated in the Flotsam Safehouse note.

properties.title: 重生
properties.description: 山内有一个巨大的神圣国度矿场，这是他们拥有的最大的一个，该地区有大量奴隶。

properties.title: 死蜂横行
properties.description:
Deadhive Overrun is mostly ruins that have been overrun hence the name by the Fogmen.

Deadhive Overrun is likely to be a past settlement/city controlled by the Holy Nation.

properties.title: 神圣军事基地
properties.description:
神圣军事基地是神圣国度拥有的小型前哨站。有两个地点，都位于奥克兰海湾。

内部建筑包括兵营和军械库。不过，它们也提供面包房、医院和护甲商人等服务。

properties.title: 圣矿
properties.description:
这些是在神圣国度高级监察官监督下的采矿作业，使用奴隶劳动。

可以使用光荣神圣地图来找到这些位置。

神圣哨兵和圣骑士担任守卫和奴隶主，注意任何在该区域附近昏倒并被哨兵或圣骑士发现的人都会被强制成为奴隶为他们工作。

properties.title: 堆栈
properties.description:
Stack是位于神圣国度领土边角的一座大城市。这座城市的位置靠近西部蜂巢和枢纽，使其成为贸易和盗贼活动的理想地点。

周围地区经常有饥饿土匪、野狗和沙尘土匪出没，这些都是相对较弱的敌人，使这里成为新角色不错的训练区域。

游戏开局的神圣国度公民可以从这个地点开始。

你可以在这里找到高级审判官塞塔。

properties.title: 奥克兰湾
properties.description:
Okran's Gulf is a region where the western part of the Holy Nation's territory is located. This area is near the Fog Islands. You can also find High Inquisitor Seta in the Barracks at Stack.

Spawns: Starving Bandits, Holy Nation Outlaws, Wild Bull

properties.title: 神圣军事基地
properties.description:
神圣军事基地是神圣国度拥有的小型前哨站。有两个地点，都位于奥克兰海湾。

内部建筑包括兵营和军械库。不过，它们也提供面包房、医院和护甲商人等服务。

properties.title: 杂种
properties.description:
Mongrel is owned by the Mongrel Faction, located at the middle of the Fog Islands. Location is extremely dangerous due to multiple Fogmen encounter during the journey but once you reach the city you will be safe because it is protected by powerful guards.

The barracks/police station is in constant conflict with Fogmen attempting to eat arrested prisoners.

properties.title: 顺从
properties.description:
顺从是雾岛北部地区的一个地点。当你接近顺从时，该区域会变得更加黑暗。

它似乎位于一个巨大的采石场中，至今仍有脚手架矗立着。在看起来像冰的"湖泊"周围，你可能会发现巨大的骷髅头和它们的上半身。

刷新的生物包括：铁蜘蛛和破碎骷髅

properties.title: 古代实验室
properties.description: 古代实验室是远古时代的遗迹。曾经是高级文明的一个功能部分，现在却变成了废墟。寻宝者应当小心谨慎，因为这些废墟并非完全沉寂。过去的机械哨兵仍在碎石中巡逻，而那些希望从这些实验室中打捞失落技术的人必须面对众多的安全蜘蛛。

properties.title: 雾岛
properties.description:
雾岛是一片山谷集合区域，永恒的低雾笼罩着大地。被遗忘文明的巨大金属残片散落在地形中，为这片土地增添了神秘色彩。一种野蛮且食人的蜂人变种被称为雾人，统治着这片土地。他们利用雾气来捕食毫无防备的人们，吞噬他们的血肉和骨头。

生成包括：雾人和逃脱的仆人

properties.title: 蜂巢村庄
properties.description:
蜂巢村庄是由西方蜂巢控制的地方。
在荒原有5个村庄，在德雷格有3个村庄。

蜂巢村民不会与玩家的蜂巢角色交易，因为他们被视为无蜂巢者，除此之外你可以与蜂巢村民交易。如果蜂巢商人发现你的小队中有无蜂巢角色，他们将不会与你交易。

properties.title: 西方蜂巢
properties.description:
Western Hive is a settlement location on an island in Vain. The surrounding water is acidic and affects Humans and Shek characters.

Upon reaching the island you will be met by a swarm of Soldier Drones patrolling the area. You will find on the Hill Hut the Queen and her Royal Soldier Drones.

properties.title: 迷雾之塔
properties.description: Tower of Fog is a single watchtower on an island off the west coast of Vain. The area is filled with Fogmen and Fog Prince.

properties.title: 最后的堡垒
properties.description:
The Shek Fortress, divided into two walled sections, is the last stand. Two Faction HQ buildings, a pub, a police station, and a few abandoned structures make up the first section.

There are four police stations, a faction headquarters, a weapon trader called Shek, a Shek armory, and a few dilapidated structures in the other walled region.

Additionally, there's a chance you'll run into several Unique Recruits at this pub, like Kang, Oron, Ruka, and Rane the Giant.

properties.title: 空荒废墟
properties.description: Empty Ruins are locations which contain no important items to loot. These damaged structures serve as cosmetic world buildings to create a greater sense that Kenshi was once a thriving place but the times has changed.

properties.title: 狂战士村庄
properties.description: Situated in the Spider Plains, the Berserker Village is a hostile Berserker camp. There are a few Berserkers and the Berserker Ghost to be found.

properties.title: 沼泽村庄
properties.description: 西北沼泽村庄位于沼泽与西北部斯滕沙漠的交界处。这个村庄被围墙包围，以帮助抵御恶劣的当地环境，村内设有一家多功能补给商店。

properties.title: 红色
properties.description: Rot is village run by the Hounds Faction within the Swamp. It becomes allied to the player once you join the Hounds by talking to Ears and Big Grim.

properties.title: 泥镇
properties.description: Mud Town is swampers village located north of Shark inside the Swamp. You can locate the Twinblades Leader here, Big Fang living on the village. The local bar is run by the Blackshifters.

properties.title: 感染实验室
properties.description: 感染实验室位于鲨鱼城东南方的沼泽中。这是一座古代实验室，现在已经变成了大部分空置的废墟。在这里可以找到血蜘蛛。

properties.title: 鲨鱼
properties.description:
它是沼泽地区贸易的中心，位于沼泽的中部。

尽管沼泽人假装统治这座城市，但你很快发现猎犬们在此设立了基地并且负责管理。在城镇中，你可以在跳舞骷髅里交易和交换信息，或者在黑衣人民的某个帮派拥有的“酒吧”中赌博。有许多小贩出售从大麻到火器的各种物品，此外还有大量的房屋可供购买。

properties.title: 沼泽地
properties.description: 沼泽人团体和几个犯罪集团把这里当作家园。猎犬帮、黑班帮、灰剥帮、石鼠帮和双刃帮是这些犯罪团体的名称。通过大麻和大麻脂的盈利商业网络，猎犬帮控制着腐烂镇和鲨鱼城。这些帮派贩卖大麻脂，这在许多地方都是被禁止的。

properties.title: 灰层村
properties.description: 灰皮村是由灰皮族在沼泽中经营的村庄，也是他们的首领大灰的家园。

properties.title: 沼泽村
properties.description: 这个沼泽村位于Shark的西南方。与它的北方对应村庄不同的是，它没有栅栏和大门，而且有些建筑物建在水面上。它是Shark和沼泽实验室之间的中途点。

properties.title: 淹没实验室
properties.description: 沼泽实验室是位于沼泽西南部的鲨鱼附近的一个古老实验室。这个位置被血蜘蛛包围。实验室内部有不活跃的安全蛛，使这个实验室相比其他实验室更受欢迎。

properties.title: 空旷废墟
properties.description: 空废墟是不包含任何战利品的地点。这些破损的建筑物作为装饰性的世界构建，营造出剑石曾经是一个繁荣之地但时间改变了一切的氛围感。

properties.title: 石鼠村
properties.description: 石鼠村是沼泽地内由石鼠派系管理的一个村庄，是石鼠派系领袖大阿尔的家园。

properties.title: 红刀据点
properties.description:
红刀藏身处是红刀派系及其领袖红刀老大的据点。它位于沼泽地的西南部。

这座建筑里有大约10-15名红刀成员，当然还有红刀老大。藏身处中唯一有价值的物品是红刀老大使用的名刀马刀。

properties.title: 空旷废墟
properties.description: 空废墟是不包含任何战利品的地点。这些破损的建筑物作为装饰性的世界构建，营造出剑石曾经是一个繁荣之地但时间改变了一切的氛围感。

properties.title: 沼泽忍者基地
properties.description: 沼泽忍者据点是沼泽忍者的基地，位于南湿地。许多沼泽忍者下忍、沼泽忍者中忍、沼泽忍者上忍，以及沼泽忍者的首领暗影都居住在这里。

properties.title: 南方湿地
properties.description:
南方湿地是一个沼泽地区，很容易通过该区域中央的大湖来识别。

无家可归者生成包括：沼泽龟、沼泽忍者、红刀帮和血蜘蛛。

properties.title: 奴隶市场
properties.description:
奴隶市场是南湿地的一个地点，奴隶贩子在此出售他们的奴隶。这个地点有一些独特招募单位，以及许多奴隶招募单位。奴隶市场主人可以在这里找到。

玩家可以使用这里的囚笼来收集联合城邦通缉角色的赏金。

如果奴隶市场主人被杀死或监禁，这个区域将变成废墟。

properties.title: 猎人基地
properties.description:
执法者负责控制被称为执法者基地的前哨。

这个地方只有执法者角色。

如果奴隶市场主人和奴隶女士Grace死亡或被囚，雇佣兵公会将掌控执法者基地。

properties.title: 小丑坚定
properties.description:
A compact town controlled by the United Cities faction, located in the Southwest region of the map known as The Hook.

Killing or capturing the Slave Market Master at the nearby Slave Market will cripple Clownsteady's economy, destroying half of the buildings.

Buildings and Shops include: a bar, a general shop, a mechanical shop, two police stations, two power stations, a ranger shop, a shinobi thieves tower, and a weapon shop.

properties.title: 中转站（钩子）
properties.description:
在流浪者终点和小丑稳定点之间是中转站。这里只有三个建筑：一家商店、一间酒吧和一栋待售的房屋。住宅建筑需要维护。附近有八十个高品质铜矿。

这里是自由寻求者可以开始的地方。

properties.title: 南方奴隶农场
properties.description:
Slave Farm South in The Hook is where characters are taken after they are enslaved by Slave Traders or Slave Hunters. Slaves can also be characters who break the law in Drifter's Last and are then given to the Slavers.

Slave Farm South is the home of Slave Mistress Grace. If Slave Mistress Grace is killed or imprisoned, this location will fall to ruins. Unlike the Slave Farm, this location can be overtaken by the Free Traders if Slave Market Master is also killed/imprisoned.

properties.title: 钩子地区
properties.description:
The Hook is part of the south coast. It is controlled mainly by the United Cities and the slavers.

Spawns include: Rebel Farmers, Slave Hunters, and Noble Hunters

properties.title: 流浪者之终
properties.description:
Drifter's Last is a Major Town controlled by the United Cities faction, located in the Southwest region of the map known as the Hook. The town has a number of farms just outside the town walls. This location is home to Lady Merin of the Noble Circle.

The area is frequently attacked by Outlaw Farmers.

If you are arrested in this city, you will be enslaved by the United Cities, then traded to Slave Traders and sent to nearby Slave Farm South.

properties.title: 图书馆废墟
properties.description:
很久以前被毁坏的图书馆废墟，墙内曾经蕴藏的知识已荡然无存。

在废墟周围散落着大量破损的书籍。

properties.title: 失落图书馆
properties.description:
不要与图书馆废墟遗址混淆，失落图书馆是被遗弃腐烂发霉的古老信息源。偶尔，这些隐藏的宝库中会包含勇敢探险者可以发掘的古代科学文献。

在这些地方经常能找到其他古老遗址的地图，包括前军事设施。

有时，大群血蜘蛛会守卫着它们。

properties.title: 图书馆废墟
properties.description:
一座早已消失的图书馆废墟，曾经收藏的所有知识都已荡然无存。

在废墟中发现了许多散落各处的损坏书籍。

properties.title: 失落图书馆
properties.description:
不要与图书馆废墟遗址混淆，失落图书馆是被遗弃腐烂发霉的古老信息源。偶尔，这些隐藏的宝库中会包含勇敢探险者可以发掘的古代科学文献。

properties.description:

在这些地方经常能找到其他古老遗址的地图，包括前军事设施。

有时，大群血蜘蛛会守卫着它们。

properties.title: 顺
properties.description:
剑石的西南部包含一个被称为"顺"的荒废区域。这里可以找到众多废墟和消失的历史遗迹。在顺地区除了搜寻物资之外没有太多事情可做。

皮蛛、大猩猩、山羊、嘎噜、白骨帮和科技猎人是一些出现的例子。

properties.title: 失落军械库
properties.description:
失落军械库是一个前哨站S-IV设施，通常以拥有一些保存完好的古董盔甲和武器而闻名。由于建筑物将拥有游戏中最高级别的锁，可能需要相当高的开锁能力。

安全蜘蛛可能偶尔会栖息在这些区域。为了避免与它们战斗，建议使用高级潜行。

properties.title: 军械库废墟
properties.description: Lost armories that have sustained damage and are no longer safely locked are known as armory ruins. They might still possess some of the treasure found in Lost Armouries. They won't probably have Security Spiders watching over them the way Lost Armouries do.

properties.title: 古代技术实验室
properties.description:
Old Tech Labs are antiquated archives of information and robotics technology that have been allowed to rot and grow mildew. This is the most dependable place to obtain an AI Core because it is guaranteed to generate AI Cores (min.1).

Security Spiders and Broken Skeletons live there.

properties.title: 虫师之座
properties.description:
臭名昭著的虫师之座位于阿拉希环形山的中心。

一大军的血蜘蛛和皮蜘蛛环绕着虫师。建议玩家在积累了一系列高等级的属性和中后期装备后，再去面对虫师。

properties.title: 旧前线
properties.description: 一个名为旧前线的废墟位于阿拉奇和蜘蛛平原边界附近。这个区域被四级围墙环绕，有许多损毁的房屋。

properties.title: 倒塌之塔
properties.description: 处于失修状态并经常倒在地面上的瞭望塔被称为倒塌之塔。由于无法进入且没有任何可掠夺的物品，它更恰当地被描述为一个地标废墟。除了其传说美学之外，这个地方似乎没有任何用途。共有三座：阿拉奇、利维坦海岸和斯滕沙漠。

properties.title: 阿拉克
properties.description: 这里是虫王居住的阿拉克。皮蛛群体繁殖的频率使这里成为剑士世界中最危险的地区之一。

properties.title: 守望者边际
properties.description: The mountain range that encircles Arach, the Bugmaster's home, is known as Watcher's Rim. There are numerous bounty hunter camps along Watcher's Rim.

properties.title: 守望者边际
properties.description: The mountain range that encircles Arach, the Bugmaster's home, is known as Watcher's Rim. There are numerous bounty hunter camps along Watcher's Rim.

properties.title: 车间综合体
properties.description: The Grid's Ancient Location is called Workshop Complex. There are three workshop buildings in this compound. The buildings used for workshops are big, hangar-like constructions. One of the few trustworthy locations to receive engineering research is this one. The Dead Workshop, Deadland Workshops, and Post-Ancient Workshop are comparable places.

properties.title: 网格区
properties.description:
网格区位于沼泽地西南方和大陨石坑东北方。在那里可以找到高级武器、工程研究和古老的研究文献。它有三个工坊建筑群，野生动物很少游荡——当然，偶尔会有喙嘴兽出没。

喙嘴兽很少在这里生成。

properties.title: 古代实验室
properties.description: The ruins of a bygone era are known as Ancient Labs. They were in ruins now, having once been an integral element of highly developed societies. Treasure hunters need to exercise caution because the ruins are still active. The wreckage is still home to the mechanical guardians of the past, and anyone trying to recover the technology that was lost in these labs will have to battle a lot of Security Spiders.

properties.title: 陨石坑
properties.description:
在地图上，陨石坑区域位于西南角。那里有很多喙兽，它们以成群的沼泽迅猛龙为食。大部分遗迹都已荒废，地形相当危险。
陨石坑的设计四面都是高墙，这使得寻找进出该区域的通道变得困难。

喙兽和沼泽迅猛龙是刷新生物的例子。

properties.title: 实验室遗址
properties.description: The Crater is home to the abandoned facility known as facility Ruin. It is possible that this site was robbed and/or destroyed before the player arrived. Occasionally, they still have some stuff inside, albeit not the highest quality.

properties.title: 采集者村落
properties.description: 在Gatherer村庄，有几名Deadcat渔夫活了下来。它被完全笼罩起来，并通过一个上锁的临时大门与外界隔离。在其防御工事外，经常能看到迷雾人和圣地亡命徒在巡逻。

properties.title: 采集者村落
properties.description: 拾荒者村庄是一个小型的达格聚落，这里居住着死猫渔夫、可疑定居者、一个独特角色及其两个宠物，定居者的小狗和心爱的山羊。这里没有商店，但如果你不攻击可疑定居者，他会卖你一些鱼。当地的迷雾人和圣国流氓经常会降临这个区域。

properties.title: 洪水地带
properties.description:
位于奥克兰海湾和食人平原之间。顾名思义，洪泽地是一片因持续不断的暴雨而被淹没的沼泽，使其成为一个阴郁的访问地点。该地区还以其古老的建筑结构而闻名，这可能表明该地区曾经工业化，并为周围生态系统的衰亡提供了解释。这些是唯一栖息着钢铁蜘蛛和安全蜘蛛的土地。

在此地的生物包括破损骷髅和钢铁蜘蛛。

properties.title: 铁道踪迹
properties.description:
The Iron Trail is a narrow flatland with sparse vegetation leading from the Cannibal Plains to the west and all the way to the eastern sea. Numerous inactive and active iron spiders will be seen along its sapphire colored glassy ground up until an island on the tip of the trail.

Spawns include: Iron Spiders

properties.title: 利维坦海岸
properties.description:
The Cannibal Plains, which are marked by a high concentration of cannibals, are situated in the northwest of the map. Because they spawn in great numbers, cannibals can swiftly overpower players.

The following are some of the spawns: Drifter (Tech Hunters), Skeleton Drifter (Tech Hunters), Escaped Servant (Holy Nation Outlaws), Cannibal Hunters, Berserkers, Beak Things, and Shrieking Bandits.

properties.title: 食人族平原
properties.description:
食人平原位于地图的西北部，以食人族高度集中而闻名。由于它们大量生成，食人族可以迅速压制玩家。

可以找到的一些生成单位包括：流浪者（科技猎人）、骨架流浪者（科技猎人）、食人族猎手、狂战士、喙兽、逃脱的仆人（神圣国度亡命徒）和食人族。

properties.title: 蜂巢村庄
properties.description:
蜂巢村庄是由西方蜂巢控制的地方。
在荒原有5个村庄，在德雷格有3个村庄。

蜂巢村民不会与玩家的蜂巢角色交易，因为他们被视为无蜂巢者，除此之外你可以与蜂巢村民交易。如果蜂巢商人发现你的小队中有无蜂巢角色，他们将不会与你交易。

properties.title: 定居的游牧村落
properties.description:
South of Raptor Island, in the Dreg area, is a settlement called Settled Nomads. The Nomads group is in charge of the village. There are three residential buildings and a Nomad Animal Shop among its four structures. The player faction is unable to purchase any of the buildings.

The Nomad Animal Shop sells creatures that players can purchase. Goats, Garrus, Bulls, and Bonedogs are available for purchase. Additionally, they sell Bull and Garru backpacks.

You can buy Cornelius the Goat here.

properties.title: Dreg
properties.description:
A region known as "Dreg" lies southeast of Raptor Island and west of the Fog Islands. Prospecting reveals that despite the area's low tree and shrub population, it is "dead". This area is mineable for low-grade copper, but it is also rich in mid-grade iron found in the form of enormous structures.

The following are some examples of spawns: Lost Drones, Drifters, Nomads, Scrawny Cannibals, Starving Bandits, Holy Nation Outlaws, and Goat Herders.

properties.title: 蜂巢村庄
properties.description: A town of hivers is called a Hive Village. There are currently six communities in the Vain region, two in the Dreg region, and two more on the northern shore in Sinkuun and The Great Desert.

properties.title: 迅猛龙岛
properties.description:
A sizable landmass on the continent's western coast is called Raptor Island. It looks sandy and has a little mountain range in the middle. It is situated slightly to the north of the Fog Islands.

Because there are so many swamp raptors on Raptor Island, the name seems fitting. While none of the raptors are hostile, they become irritated when people approach their nests.

Its sandy aspect is matched by a natural backdrop that is rich in flora and contains a few scattered trees.

properties.title: 迅猛龙岛
properties.description:
On the continent's western shore sits a sizable landmass known as Raptor Island. Slightly to the north of the Fog Islands, the island's center features a minor mountain range, giving it a sandy appearance.

The number of Swamp Raptors on Raptor Island makes it fittingly called. While not hostile, the raptors become irritated when people approach their nests.

Fitting for its sandy appearance, the natural terrain also features plenty of vegetation and a few thin trees.dw

properties.title: 狂战士领地
properties.description: A hostile area known as Berserker Country gets its name from the people who live there. The entire area is designed with a backdrop of scarlet red, representing the rocky environment, as opposed to the lush foliage of The Shrieking Forest. Spiders are visible all the way along the shore, passing through Purple Sands and up to The Iron Trail farther to the north. The coastline appears to be adorned with a large number of dormant spiders.

properties.title: 尖啸森林
properties.description:
Situated north of the Fog Islands and Obedience, west of the Floodlands, and south of the Purple Sands, lies a densely vegetated area known as the Shrieking Forest. The term comes from the Shrieking Bandits who live there.

A few spawns are the screeching bandits.

properties.title: 紫沙地
properties.description:
位于尖啸森林北部和钢铁小径南部的一片大沙漠被称为紫沙漠。该地区散布在整个沙漠中、部分被掩埋的卫星状建筑，以及沙漠沙土的紫色，使其极易辨认。

食人族、尖啸强盗、喙兽和加鲁是该地区会出现的一些生物。

properties.title: 后古代车间
properties.description: Purple Sands' Post-Ancient Workshop is an ancient location. This workshop is a big building that resembles a hangar. One of the few trustworthy locations to receive engineering research is this one. The Dead Workshop, Deadland Workshops, and Workshop Complex are comparable places.

properties.title: 空荒废墟
properties.description: Empty Ruins are locations which contain no loot. These damaged structures serve as cosmetic world building to create a greater sense that Kenshi was once a thriving place but time has changed.

properties.title: 废塔
properties.description: A destroyed tower located in the Floodlands.

properties.title: 古代实验室
properties.description: The ruins of a bygone era are known as Ancient Labs. They were in ruins now, having once been an integral element of highly developed societies. Treasure hunters need to exercise caution because the ruins are still active. The wreckage is still home to the mechanical guardians of the past, and anyone trying to recover the technology that was lost in these labs will have to battle a lot of Security Spiders.

properties.title: 倾斜塔
properties.description: A leaning structure with some treasure inside that is situated in a floodlands.

properties.title: 倒塌之塔
properties.description: 处于失修状态并经常倒在地面上的瞭望塔被称为倒塌之塔。由于无法进入且没有任何可掠夺的物品，它更恰当地被描述为一个地标废墟。除了其传说美学之外，这个地方似乎没有任何用途。共有三座：阿拉奇、利维坦海岸和斯滕沙漠。

properties.title: 空荒废墟
properties.description: Empty Ruins are locations which contain no loot. These damaged structures serve as cosmetic world building to create a greater sense that Kenshi was once a thriving place but time has changed.

properties.title: 伯恩之塔
properties.description:
伯恩留在位于洪水地带北部的伯恩之塔中，直到被召唤。伯恩位于塔外等待。

塔内有相当数量的宝藏。最重要的是骨架修理包，如果伯恩是玩家派系的初始骨架新兵，这些修理包是必需的。

properties.title: 可疑实验室
properties.description:
看起来像是一个研究中心，已经被一群凶猛的食人族占领。

偶尔，你可以在这里找到古代科学书籍，要么在建筑上层的上锁储物箱中，要么散落在地板上。

properties.title: 侦查哨
properties.description: Flotsam Ninja outpost situated directly on the boundary between the Cannibal Plains and the Hidden Forest.

properties.title: 食人族村庄
properties.description: 这些定居点的主要特征是床铺、帐篷和临时搭建的金属棚屋，用来收容囚犯。通常，有许多游荡的食人族小队要么在定居点内睡觉，要么在该区域巡逻。

properties.title: 旧村庄
properties.description: 一个位于食人族故土中心的古老废弃定居点。

properties.title: 食人族村庄
properties.description:
食人族村庄是食人族为其派系建立的小型前哨站，用作集结区域和休息场所。

这些定居点的主要特征是床铺、帐篷和用于关押囚犯的临时金属棚屋。通常，有许多游荡的食人族小队要么在定居点内睡觉，要么在该区域巡逻。

properties.title: 食人族村庄
properties.description:
A Cannibal Village is a Minor Outpost established by Cannibals for their faction's use as a staging area and resting place.

The main features of these settlements are beds, tents, and improvised metal shacks that house prisoners. Usually, there are many roving cannibal squads that are either sleeping in the settlement or patrolling the area.

properties.title: 食人魔之都
properties.description:
Cannibals have taken over the town that was once called Deadcat. Initially, it will show up on the map as the neutral town of Deadcat, probably to trick players into thinking it's a safe haven from the hordes of cannibals that are pursuing them.

There are plenty of scrawny cannibals and cannibals in the region. There are also at least four cannibal chiefs, two of whom are tasked with defending the cannibal grand wizard.

properties.title: 军械库废墟
properties.description:
失落军械库是前哨站S-IV设施，通常以保存完好的古董盔甲和武器而闻名。由于建筑物拥有游戏中最高级别的锁，可能需要相当高的开锁技能。

安全蜘蛛可能偶尔会栖息在这些区域。为了避免与它们战斗，建议使用高级潜行技能。

properties.title: 老帝国瞭望塔
properties.description: A watchtower in ruins. includes precious garbage like power cores, robotic parts, and crafting supplies. maybe research books as well.

properties.title: 失落军械库
properties.description:
失落军械库是一个前哨站S-IV设施，通常以拥有一些保存完好的古董盔甲和武器而闻名。由于建筑物将拥有游戏中最高级别的锁，可能需要相当高的开锁能力。

安全蜘蛛可能偶尔会栖息在这些区域。为了避免与它们战斗，建议使用高级潜行。

properties.title: 失落军械库
properties.description:
Ancient weapons and armor that have been preserved are typically found in Lost Armories, an Outpost S-IV facility. The structure will contain some of the highest locks in the game, therefore strong lockpicking abilities may be needed.

Security Spiders have been known to occasionally reside in certain areas. It's advised to use High Stealth to prevent conflict with them.

properties.title: 失落图书馆
properties.description:
不要与图书馆废墟遗址混淆，失落图书馆是被遗弃腐烂发霉的古老信息来源。偶尔，这些隐藏的宝库中会包含勇敢探险家可以发掘的古代科学文献。

在这些地方经常能找到其他古老遗址的地图，包括前军事设施。

有时，大群血蜘蛛会守卫着它们。

properties.title: 失落军械库
properties.description:
Lost Armories, an Outpost S-IV facility, is typically known to have some very well-preserved antique armor and weapons. Because the building will have some of the highest locks in the game, considerable lockpicking abilities may be necessary.

Security Spiders may occasionally live in these areas. To avoid fighting them, it is advised to use High Stealth.

properties.title: 老帝国瞭望塔
properties.description: A ruined watchtower. Contains crafting materials, robotic components and valuable junk such as power cores. May also contain research books.

properties.title: 倒塌之塔
properties.description: 年久失修且经常倒塌在地的瞭望塔被称为倒塌之塔。由于无法进入且没有任何可掠夺的物品，将其描述为地标性废墟更为恰当。除了其传说美学价值外，这个地方似乎没有任何用途。共有三座：阿拉克、利维坦海岸和斯滕沙漠。

properties.title: 古代科技实验室
properties.description:
古老科技实验室是信息和机器人技术的过时档案库，已经被允许腐烂和发霉。这是获得AI核心最可靠的地方，因为它保证能生成AI核心（最少1个）。

安全蜘蛛和破损骷髅生活在那里。

properties.title: 隐藏森林
properties.description:
隐秘森林区的大部分为岩石稀疏的林地。除了南部的一些不肥沃的水源和靠近北海岸的高水肥度地区，勘探几乎找不到任何自然资源。北海岸有大量河流猛禽群。

骨狗、山羊、飘摇忍者、食人族、食人族猎人和游牧民是该地区的常见生物。

properties.title: 侦查哨
properties.description: Flotsam Ninja outpost situated directly on the boundary between the Cannibal Plains and the Hidden Forest.

properties.title: 文德
properties.description:
温德河流经神圣国度的领土。它位于世界尽头以南和重生以东。它被归类为干旱地区且地势较高。

在水泡山以北，有一座桥横跨这条河。

实际上角色无法从温德直接到达失落图书馆；相反，他们必须返回重生才能找到通往那里的路线。在到达上锁的图书馆门之前，玩家必须穿过一群血蜘蛛。

properties.title: 欧克兰的谷地
properties.description: 位于神圣国家中心地带的区域被称为欧克兰的谷地。这个区域没有任何值得注意的地点。

properties.title: 欧克兰之臂
properties.description: To the east and west of Okran's Valley are two mountainous, verdant areas that make up the Arm of Okran.

properties.title: 欧克兰之臂
properties.description: 奥克兰之谷的东西两侧是组成奥克兰之臂的两个多山、郁郁葱葱的地区。

properties.title: 铁谷
properties.description: Iron Valleys is an area located north of the Deadlands. Much like the Deadlands, Iron Valleys acts like a environmental barrier because of constant Acid Rain plaguing the area. The area is made harder to traverse because of the rocky valleys its named for, but there are some bridges connecting the top portions making it a little easier.The area is also patrolled by Iron Spiders.

properties.title: 黑色沙漠
properties.description: This location has acid rain.

properties.title: 死亡之地
properties.description:
The Skeletons reside in their town of Black Desert City in the Deadlands, one of the most contaminated areas in the game. This area is characterized by constant acid rain, acid soils, gloomy weather, and a dead atmosphere, which makes it difficult to set up initially.

Among the spawns are Iron Spiders.

properties.title: 灰色沙漠
properties.description:
游戏中一些最受污染的区域被相对较小的灰色沙漠区域所包围。在前往死地中的黑沙漠城市之前，唯一的补给点是孤独的科技猎人驿站，可以从东侧到达。

黑沙漠忍者、叛军农民、灰皮剥夺者、游牧民、掠夺者、血袭者、奴隶贩子、亚布塔流放者、铁蜘蛛、黑狗和奴役主宰是游戏中可以遇到的一些生成单位。

properties.title: 眼域
properties.description: 围绕中央结构的区域被称为"眼"。当玩家足够接近时，盟友会开始讨论这个结构。主要结构resembles一颗坠落的卫星，呈环形。骷髅玩家角色是能够透露更多关于卫星具体细节的角色类型之一。

properties.title: Venge
properties.description:
Venge consists of heated valleys and mountains. The most distinctive feature of Venge are the laser beams that incinerate anyone except Skeletons.
Player characters may also comment that Venge is "where the gutters come to hunt for spiders." Although Beak Things and Blood Spiders can spawn in this area, the primary dangers are large squads of Weak Thralls.

properties.title: 不受欢迎的区域
properties.description:
Until players have exceptionally experienced fighters and need Animal Skins or Raw Meat, the Unwanted Zone lives good to its name. There are lots of crabs and beak things living there. This zone has a lot of nests, thus it's a fantastic place to find Beak Thing and crab eggs.

This Zone should be avoided by players looking for a decent route between Stobe's Gamble, the Anti-Slaver's house, to The Outlands, the Anti-Slaver recruit Bo's home.

properties.title: 风暴海岸
properties.description: 风暴峡海岸是联合城邦领土的一部分。

properties.title: 风暴海岸
properties.description: 风暴峡海岸是联合城邦领土的一部分。

properties.title: 禁地岛
properties.description: The Forbidden Isle, which lies east of Stormgap Coast, is an unfriendly and depressing region. This little land mass should be investigated by the brave or the insane. It is home to hordes of Iron Spiders who most likely came from the Spider Factory in the center of the island and aggressive Tech Hunters looking to seize the knowledge that have been lost.

properties.title: 无主之地
properties.description: 小派系黑狗位于被称为外域的危险区域中。这里是黑划痕的所在地，一个由科技猎人控制的主要城镇。反奴隶制独特新兵Bo和大图书馆是黑划痕最突出的两个特色。

properties.title: 斯托比的花园
properties.description: 掠夺者居住在斯托贝花园。此外，这里也是斯托贝的最终安息之地。

properties.title: 绿滩
properties.description:
The Crab Raiders are the main group in charge of Greenbeach.

Crabs, Crab Raiders, Reavers, and Beak Things are some of the spawns.

properties.title: 东部矿坑
properties.description:
The Pits East is the home of the Crab Raiders. In Crab Town, the home of the Queen of the Crab Raiders, players can become "crabbed" and Unique Recruit Lumi can be found.
Crabs, as well as Crab Raider patrols, are common in this Zone. Players may be amused to watch the horror which Crab Raiders experience when wild Crabs are hostile towards them.

properties.title: 深坑
properties.description:
在地图上，深坑是位于东南角的一个区域。那里经常发生蟹人掠夺者和骷髅强盗之间的冲突。

蟹人掠夺者和骷髅强盗是两个刷怪点的例子。

properties.title: 峭壁
properties.description:
骷髅强盗生活在岩峰地区。

狙击机器人、黑色大猩猩、漂泊者、陆地蝙蝠、掠夺者、螃蟹袭击者和骷髅强盗是一些会刷新的敌人。

properties.title: 斯托贝的赌博
properties.description:
反奴隶主义者居住在斯托贝的赌博地带。这里是春天和自由城的所在地，这两个都是反奴隶主义者的定居点。国王戈里洛的住所是该区域中几个古代遗迹之一。

如果你需要大麻（一种在沼泽地以外很难找到的资源），可以突袭隐藏毒品农场。小心——安全蜘蛛可能会出现在毒品农场的几座建筑中。

properties.title: 平原泻湖
properties.description:
In comparison to the most of the Southeast region of the map, the Flats Lagoon is a somewhat secure Zone. Trade Caravans frequently spawn here.
The town of Flats Lagoon is well-known for having Robot Limbs and Unique Recruit Chad, as well as a Travel Shop that offers a variety of Research Artifacts for sale.

properties.title: 闪姆
properties.description:
谢姆是一个充满喙兽的沙质沼泽。游牧民族和灰剥者帮派走私者都把这里称为家园。

走私者酒吧是一个值得记住的地方，特别是对于那些路过邻近文格地区的人来说。除了劫持大灰作为人质之外，灰剥者没有理由对玩家抱有敌意——这里有充足的床位。

properties.title: 燃烧森林
properties.description: 被称为"燃烧森林"的沼泽地区是许多血蜘蛛的栖息地。它的名字来源于该地区经常降下的酸雨。位于该区域中央的古代实验室是唯一能躲避酸雨的地方，那里可能还栖息着一些安全蜘蛛。

properties.title: 高原骨野
properties.description:
卡顿以北是一座名为高骨原的山脉。

皮蛛、喙兽、骨场狼、骨犬、白骨帮和加鲁是一些刷新生物的例子。

properties.title: 骨野
properties.description:
The numerous bones that are scattered around the vast, arid plain known as the Bonefields are immediately identifiable. Along with the aggressive Gorrillo Bandits, there are a lot of hostile creatures.

The following are examples of spawns: Leviathans, Beak Things, Skin Spiders, Gorillo Bandits, Boneyard Wolfs, Bonedogs, Band of Bones, and Garru.

properties.title: 菲什曼岛
properties.description:
A tiny area to the south of the Bonefields is called Fishman Island.
Players do not need to worry about requiring the Swimming stat in order to enter this zone because it is an island. The bridge that connects Black Desert City with Scraphouse and the bridge that spans the Wend River north of Blister Hill is located in the area that is highlighted on the map to the north of the island.

properties.title: 骗子跑
properties.description:
The beach area immediately south of the Royal Valley is known as Cheaters Run. There may be an easier way to get to the Ashlands by running through this area.

Fishmen and Iron Spiders are among the spawns.

properties.title: 皇家谷地
properties.description:
南方蜂巢位于皇家山谷。

生成的生物包括山羊和南方蜂巢人。

properties.title: 灰架
properties.description:
东南部的一个区域被称为灰架。南方蜂巢是主要的占领者。

山羊、黑色大猩猩、南方蜂巢人和大猩猩是其中的生物。

properties.title: 狙击手山谷
properties.description:
Sniper Valley is a region close to the Ashlands in the southeast of the continent.

Sniperbots, Black Gorillos, Goats, Scavengers, Leviathans, and Crab Raiders are some examples of spawns.

properties.title: 索诺鲁斯黑暗之地
properties.description:
皮肤强盗居住在响音黑暗中。这标志着灰烬之地半岛的开始。

皮肤强盗、骷髅军团、铁蜘蛛、狙击机器人和黑猩猩是这里的一些生物。

properties.title: 灰烬之地
properties.description:
The Ashlands, a desolate region, were under the control of the Second Empire. Along with the rare Cleanser Unit, groups of Skeletons and Iron Spiders from the Skeleton Legion patrol this area. Large clouds of poison gas are also occasionally visible in this area. Because of this, if any of the players' characters are at risk, they should bring a fog mask.

Numerous Meitou grade weaponry and Research Artifacts can be found in abundance in this zone.

properties.title: 淹没废墟
properties.description:
在分隔重生之地与隐秘森林的河流中段，一个早已被遗忘的村庄废墟残存至今，这里便是沉没遗迹。

尽管部分被海水淹没，这些遗迹并非完全荒废。在沉没遗迹中住着一个孤独的骷髅商人，他自称铠甲之王，还有他的三个奴仆、一只安保蜘蛛，以及他的皇家卫队。

沿河游泳上行或下行是到达这里的唯一方式。

properties.title: 漂浮村
properties.description: The Flotsam Village serves as the Flotsam Ninjas' headquarters and is where their leader, Moll, resides. It is situated north of Rebirth in the Hidden Forest.

properties.title: 圣农场
properties.description: Holy Farms are a group of comparable small Greenlander settlements in area held by The Holy Nation. They are thought to be the faction's main supply of food and agricultural products for trade.

properties.title: 奥克兰之盾
properties.description:
The strongly fortified hamlet known as Okran's Shield was built to protect the eastern entrance to Holy Nation territory. A reinforced chokepoint that divides the town in half runs through it. You can sneak past the settlement by going through the perilous Iron Valleys to the south, or by passing through a small mountain pass to the north.

This is where you can find High Inquisitor Valtena in the Barracks.

properties.title: 圣农场
properties.description: Holy Farms are a group of comparable small Greenlander settlements in area held by The Holy Nation. They are thought to be the faction's main supply of food and agricultural products for trade.

properties.title: 纳科的陷阱
properties.description:
The Holy Nation is in charge of the Minor Outpost known as Narko's Trap. Heavily defended, it houses multiple Holy Nation Barracks. The Paladin Guardians are a special type of soldier that guard Narko's Trap.

As can be seen on the Artifacts page, Narko's Evil Tower boasts one of the largest conceivable numbers of Research Artifacts.

properties.title: 失落军械库
properties.description: 失落军械库是一个前哨站S-IV设施，以拥有一些保存完好的古董盔甲和武器而闻名。由于该建筑将拥有游戏中最高等级的锁具，可能需要相当高的开锁技能。

properties.title: 死地工坊
properties.description: 这是少数几个能够获得工程学研究的可信赖地点之一。死亡工坊、后古代工坊和工坊建筑群是类似的地方。

properties.title: 失落军械库
properties.description: 失落军械库是一个前哨站S-IV设施，以拥有一些保存完好的古董盔甲和武器而闻名。由于该建筑将拥有游戏中最高等级的锁具，可能需要相当高的开锁技能。

properties.title: 重编程车间
properties.description: A deserted workshop in the Deadlands with 26 characters in the error code 0xFFFFFF. A couple of bolts are missing, but it's not nearly broken. The first person they come into contact with will turn into an ally, someone they will fiercely defend and follow. They will stare you down, cry "Protect Master!" and attack anything that might be thought to be a threat.

properties.title: 黑沙漠城市
properties.description: Black Desert City is a Town run by Skeletons in the middle of the Deadlands region. As there are no human residents, the town lacks a food supply as is noted by the town’s bartender, however edible food can be found in containers within the other buildings. There are regular beds and skeleton repair beds on the second floor of the bar.

properties.title: 废料屋
properties.description:
废料屋是一家武器和商人店铺，位于死地的一座旧工厂内，就在黑沙漠城的正东方。请注意附近的酸雨。

店主奎因经常与他们的伙伴达克交谈。

八名士兵机器人守卫和五只安全蜘蛛II型在店内巡逻。

properties.title: 荒地工坊
properties.description: Large, hangar-like buildings called Deadlands Workshops can be found in the Deadlands. The actual constructions consist of two "walkway" sections on either side of the Workshop, with one or two switchback ramps leading up and Mounted Crossbows with spotlights positioned overhead. There are a variety of equipment, tool stations, and containers throughout the walkways, from simple crates to sophisticated lockable chests.

properties.title: 失落军械库
properties.description: 失落军械库是一个前哨站S-IV设施，以拥有一些保存完好的古董盔甲和武器而闻名。由于该建筑将拥有游戏中最高等级的锁具，可能需要相当高的开锁技能。

properties.title: 死地工坊
properties.description: 在死地中可以找到被称为死地工坊的大型机库式建筑。实际建筑由工坊两侧的两个"走道"部分组成，有一到两个之字形坡道通向上方，顶部安装有带聚光灯的弩炮。走道上有各种设备、工具站和容器，从简单的板条箱到精密的可上锁箱子。

properties.title: 武器库废墟
properties.description: Lost armories that have sustained damage and are no longer safely locked are known as armory ruins. They might still possess some of the treasure found in Lost Armouries. They won't likely be under the same Security Spider protection as Lost Armouries.

properties.title: 走私者酒吧
properties.description: Smugglers Bar is one of the Grayflayers' outpost bars. It can be found in Shem. This area is home to smugglers and a few of the randomly called Unique Recruits and Generic Recruits.

properties.title: 虐待之塔
properties.description:
The Thrall Masters' headquarters is the Tower of Abuse. It can be found in Venge. On the upper level, there are two Skeleton Repair Beds that are available for free usage.

Inside the Tower are Screamer the False and Ponk, the commanders of the Thrall Masters.

Similar to the Artifacts System, the tower is an Ancient Tech Lab and is capable of containing loot.

It is possible to save the special recruit Agnu from the second level.

properties.title: 定居的游牧
properties.description:
South of the Deadlands, in the Shem area, sits the town of Settled Nomads. The Nomads group is in charge of the village. Five buildings make up the complex: a Nomad Animal Shop and four residential structures. The player faction is unable to purchase any of the buildings.

The Nomad Animal Shop sells creatures that players can purchase. Goats, Garrus, Bulls, and Bonedogs are available for purchase. Additionally, they sell Bull and Garru backpacks.

properties.title: 农场废墟
properties.description:
农场废墟是通常由被拆毁的建筑结构组成的地方，几乎没有什么宝藏。为了营造Kenshi曾经是一个繁华社区的印象，这些废墟建筑被用作装饰性的世界建构。

值得注意的是，在奥克兰山谷的农场废墟中有四张营地床可供免费使用。

properties.title: 古代实验室
properties.description: 过去时代的废墟被称为古代实验室。它们现在已成废墟，曾经是高度发达社会的重要组成部分。寻宝者需要小心谨慎，因为这些废墟仍然活跃。废墟中仍然栖息着过去的机械守护者，任何试图从这些实验室中回收失落技术的人都必须与大量安全蜘蛛作战。

properties.title: 空旷废墟
properties.description: There are places called empty ruins that have no treasure. In order to convey a stronger sense that Kenshi was once a bustling community but that times have changed, these destroyed buildings are used as cosmetic world building.

properties.title: 哀恸镇
properties.description:
位于骨野中卡屯和平滩泻湖之间，哀伤镇是一个主要城镇。哀伤镇高耸于城镇的南北两侧，坐落在一座古老的金属建筑内。一场奴隶起义摧毁了这个曾经繁荣的采矿社区。大部分建筑都被毁坏了，城门处也没有守卫。

大白猩猩居住在哀伤镇，被囚禁在废弃的总部建筑中。

酒吧里有臭名昭著的蓝眼。

properties.title: Catun
properties.description:
United Cities have sovereignty over Catun, a major town. It is situated in the Bonefields on a plateau in the center of a valley.

The Catun Scrapmasters are based in this town.

The Noble Circle member for Catun in residence is Lord Shiro. Fishmen will seize control of Catun if he is killed or abducted.

properties.title: 旧监狱
properties.description: The Gorrillo Bandits' headquarters is The Old Prison. It is situated practically exactly south of Mourn on the southeast corner of the Bonefields. Gorrillo, the faction leader, and his Gorillo Bandits are waiting for you inside.

properties.title: 鱼岛
properties.description:
On Fishman Island, Fish Isle is a significant town. Fishmen live there, just like they do on the rest of the island.

A lot of low level stuff spawns at this spot.

properties.title: 岛屿实验室
properties.description:
A small site on Fishman Island is called Island Lab. This is where you can find the King Gurgler.

This may contain some AI Cores.

properties.title: 死寂的渔村
properties.description: Skeletons with ErrorCode 0x000000 live in a place called Dead Fishing Village. The Old Machines faction's skeletons will make an effort to "arrest" any characters that enter this area.

properties.title: 警察营房
properties.description:
这些区域居住着错误代码0x000000或旧帝国警察机器人，它们拥有极少的财宝。

狙击手谷的警察营房看起来已经荒废，尽管有迹象表明里面的机器人在CPU损坏后创造了剥皮强盗。考虑到他们基地的距离如此之近，这一点显得更加可信。

properties.title: 南门蜂巢
properties.description: 南方蜂巢是南方蜂巢的一个聚落，在那里可以找到南方女王和她的精英无人机卫兵。它位于皇家山谷的南部。

properties.title: 南门蜂巢村
properties.description: A community under Southern Hive ownership.

properties.title: 希弗占领军械库
properties.description:
Hiver-Claimed Armoury is a Southern Hive-controlled area. Three of these spots can be found in Kenshi: one in Royal Valley and two in Greyshelf.

Characters like Armoury Droneguard, Prince, Droneguard, and Drone may be found in these locales.

Reaver Camp sites may be taken over by the Southern Hive and transformed into a place akin to a Hiver-Claimed Armoury in the event that Valamon is slain or abducted.

properties.title: 恐怖废墟
properties.description: 皮肤强盗居住的地方。

properties.title: 军械库废墟
properties.description: Lost armories that have sustained damage and are no longer safely locked are known as armory ruins. They might still possess some of the treasure found in Lost Armouries. They won't likely be under the same Security Spider protection as Lost Armouries.

properties.title: 南门蜂巢村
properties.description: a community under Southern Hive ownership.

properties.title: 希弗占领军械库
properties.description:
南方蜂巢负责管理蜂巢占领军械库。在《Kenshi》中，有三个这样的地点：一个在皇家谷地，两个在灰架。

在这些地方可以找到王子、军械库无人机卫兵、无人机等角色。

如果瓦拉蒙被杀害或绑架，南方蜂巢可能会夺取掠夺者营地的控制权，将其转变为类似蜂巢占领军械库的地方。

properties.title: 军械库废墟
properties.description: Lost armories that have sustained damage and are no longer safely locked are known as armory ruins. They might still possess some of the treasure found in Lost Armouries. They won't likely be under the same Security Spider protection as Lost Armouries.

properties.title: 希弗占领军械库
properties.description:
Hiver-Claimed Armoury is a Southern Hive-controlled area. Three of these spots can be found in Kenshi: one in Royal Valley and two in Greyshelf.

Characters like Armoury Droneguard, Prince, Droneguard, and Drone may be found in these locales.

Reaver Camp sites may be taken over by the Southern Hive and transformed into a place akin to a Hiver-Claimed Armoury in the event that Valamon is slain or abducted.

properties.title: 皮肤屋
properties.description:
皮肤强盗控制着被称为皮肤屋的区域。总共有五个皮肤屋，每一个都有可能容纳八到十二个皮肤强盗个体。剥皮机器可能是这些地方中的一个。

如果萨凡特被杀死或监禁，南方蜂巢将接管这个地方。如果南方女王也被杀死或囚禁，这些地方将被夷为平地。

properties.title: 皮肤屋
properties.description:
The Skin Bandits are in control of Skinhouse. There are five Skinhouses in all, and there can be eight to twelve Skin Bandit characters in each. Peeler Machines will probably be among these sites.

In the event that Savant is killed or imprisoned, the Southern Hive will take over here. These locations will become ruins if the Queen of the South is also killed or imprisoned.

properties.title: 阿什兰圆顶废墟
properties.description: 阿什兰圆顶废墟是一个位于古代废墟统治下的古老地点。这里没有活人或物品生成。

properties.title: 卡隆的流放地
properties.description:
The Throne of Cat-Lon, the insane and self-proclaimed Emperor of this place, is Cat-Lon's Exile. Situated far into the Ashlands. The Bugmaster's Map can be used to designate the location. Unlike the Ashland Domes, which are under the rule of the Second Empire, this area is under the control of the Second Empire Exile faction.

120 Stormthralls are housed in the first dome. Cat-Lon lies in the second dome.

The remains of a floating spacecraft appear to be passing over this location.

properties.title: 阿什兰圆顶废墟
properties.description: 阿什兰圆顶废墟是一个位于古代废墟统治下的古老地点。这里没有活人或物品生成。

properties.title: 阿什兰圆顶 IV
properties.description:
The massive, multi-story Ashland Dome IV is a dome-shaped building situated in the Ashlands. There are two entrances on the dome, and in the center is a winding staircase that leads to the upper stories.

It is situated south of Ashland Dome III and is home to multiple Old Empire Police Captains as well as General Hat-12.

properties.title: 阿什兰圆顶III
properties.description:
一座巨大的多层建筑，呈圆顶形状，灰地圆顶III位于灰地。圆顶上有两个入口，中央有一个螺旋楼梯通往上层。

它位于灰地圆顶II的东北方，是多个液压骑士以及将军张的驻地。

properties.title: 阿什兰圆顶 II
properties.description:
Situated in the Ashlands, Ashland Dome II is a spacious, multi-story building that resembles a dome. There are two entrances on the dome, and in the center is a winding staircase that leads to the upper stories.

It is situated to the south of Ashland Dome I and is home to many Screamer Units and Rhinobot.

properties.title: 亚什兰圆顶 I
properties.description:
Situated in the Ashlands, Ashland Dome I is a spacious, multi-story building that resembles a dome. There are two entrances on the dome, and in the center is a winding staircase that leads to the upper stories.

The Head of Agriculture and multiple Legion Thralls are housed there, and it's southeast of the Skinhouse Headquarters.

properties.title: 皮肤屋总部
properties.description:
The Skin Bandits faction's headquarters is called Skinhouse HQ. This is where you may find Savant, the leader of the Skin Bandits.

Anyone approaching this area runs the risk of being taken hostage and having their skin removed by a Peeler Machine. It should be safe for Skeletons and Hive Princes to enter this area.

properties.title: 屏障塔
properties.description: 屏障塔上的Mk 2鱼叉炮由几个升级版守望机器人骷髅操控。

properties.title: 远征 5
properties.description: Under the Tech Hunters' control.

properties.title: 警察营房
properties.description:
这些区域居住着错误代码0x000000或旧帝国警察机器人，它们拥有极少的财宝。

狙击手谷的警察营房看起来已经荒废，尽管有迹象表明里面的机器人在CPU损坏后创造了剥皮强盗。考虑到他们基地的距离如此之近，这一点显得更加可信。

properties.title: 狙击塔
properties.description:
Numerous Upgraded Watchbot Skeletons are stationed at the summit of Sniper Tower, guarding Mk 2 Harpoons.

The third level of the tower has beds with the standard 8x healing multiplier for non-skeleton characters, if you can make it out or are very daring. Unfortunately, because of where the garbage is placed, only one bed may be used.

properties.title: 春泉镇
properties.description:
反奴隶者的根据地是春天。它位于斯托贝赌局的西南部，坐落在山顶上。在派系总部内可以见到传奇人物铁拳。

如果铁拳被谋杀或绑架，这个地点将被重写。

建筑和商店包括派系总部笼子、两个水培结构、一个游侠商店、一个三级钢铁精炼厂和一个科技猎人商店。

properties.title: 秘密药物农场
properties.description:
The Blackshifters own Secret Drug Farm, which is situated in Stobe's Gamble. It has a lot of hemp and hashish in it, which may be sold for a lot of money at the neighboring city of Flats Lagoon.

Six of these residences are destroyed, and the other five are shut. Additionally, it is home to several Security Spiders II, who will attack you right away.

properties.title: 自由定居点
properties.description:
布林克南部有一个被遗弃的小定居点，叫做自由定居点。虽然它是联合城市的一部分，但既没有居民也没有巡逻卫兵驻扎在那里。一些建筑已成废墟，其中有一些建筑材料、铁板、燃料和其他不太重要的物品。

如果特定的世界状态得以实现，自由定居点可能会变成自由城市。

properties.title: 崩塌实验室
properties.description:
Crumbling Labs is an Ancient Location that has a crumbling citadel structure and Ancient Labs. King Gorillo is within the crumbling citadel.

Both buildings' surrounding waterways have an acidic pH.

properties.title: 警察营房
properties.description:
这些区域居住着错误代码0x000000或旧帝国警察机器人，它们拥有极少的财宝。

狙击手谷的警察营房看起来已经荒废，尽管有迹象表明里面的机器人在CPU损坏后创造了剥皮强盗。考虑到他们基地的距离如此之近，这一点显得更加可信。

properties.title: 亡命工坊
properties.description: 此位置的储存容器将被上锁，锁的级别范围从25到75。这个地方可能拥有旧世界技术，如骨骼修理套装和工程研究。

properties.title: 蟹镇
properties.description: Located southeast of The Pits East, Crab Town is a Minor Outpost under the power of the Crab Raiders. This is also where you can find the Unique Recruit Lumi and the Crab Queen. This shop sells Crabs, which players may purchase.

properties.title: 失落军械库
properties.description: 失落军械库是一个前哨站S-IV设施，以拥有一些保存完好的古董盔甲和武器而闻名。由于该建筑将拥有游戏中最高等级的锁具，可能需要相当高的开锁技能。

properties.title: 蟹村
properties.description: Controlled by the Crab Raiders.

properties.title: 蜘蛛塔
properties.description: In Stobe's Garden, the Tower of Spiders is a watchtower inhabited by 20–40 Elder Blood Spiders and filled with various relics, such as Ancient Science Books and skeleton repair kits.

properties.title: 失落军械库
properties.description:
Lost Armories, an Outpost S-IV facility, is typically known to have some very well-preserved antique armor and weapons. Because the building will have some of the highest locks in the game, considerable lockpicking abilities may be necessary.

Security Spiders may occasionally live in these areas. To avoid fighting them, it is advised to use High Stealth.

properties.title: 铁总部
properties.description:
An outpost in The Crags is called Iron Headquarters. This is the Skeleton Bandits' faction headquarters, where Elder, their commander, is located.

This outpost consists of a faction headquarters and a large number of abandoned wallhouses.

properties.title: 掠夺者营地
properties.description:
掠夺者负责管理掠夺者营地。这里很可能是掠夺者关押被奴役玩家的地方。掠夺者营地位于三个不同的地点：外域、斯托比花园和峭壁边缘。

在这些区域可以找到四到六名掠夺者幼崽、二到十二名掠夺者奴隶、四名掠夺者铁甲兵、十一到十七名掠夺者血裔，以及二到四名掠夺者新手。

properties.title: 平原泻湖
properties.description:
One of the major towns under the Tech Hunters' control is Flats Lagoon.

You can inquire about the Ashlands with the town's bartender, although the majority of the information they provide is more precisely about the surrounding regions that players must pass through in order to get to the Ashlands.
Flats Lagoon is not affected by any World States, just like any other Tech Hunters location.

properties.title: 中继站废墟
properties.description: The site of Waystation Ruins is in the southeast. It might be where the Freedom Seekers game begins. In addition to Stobe's Garden, Venge has a Waystation Ruins.

properties.title: 掠夺者营地
properties.description:
Reaver Camp is a location controlled by the Reavers. Players who are enslaved by Reavers will likely be taken to this location. There are three Reaver Camps: one on the border of The Crags and Stobe's Garden, one in Stobe's Garden, and one in The Outlands.

These locations can contain 4 to 6 Reaver Whelp characters, 2 to 12 Reaver Slave characters, 4 Reaver Ironclad, 11 to 17 Reaver Blooded, and 2 to 4 Reaver Neophyte characters.

properties.title: 远征队4
properties.description: 由科技猎人控制。

properties.title: 方舟
properties.description:
The Reavers' headquarters, Ark, is also where Valamon, their commander, resides. It is situated somewhat to the north of Stobe's Garden's core.

The Crab Raiders will take Ark over if Valamon is killed or abducted.

properties.title: 蟹村
properties.description: 蟹族掠夺者负责管理被称为蟹村的前哨站。

properties.title: 掠夺者营地
properties.description:
The Reavers are in charge of Reaver Camp. This is probably where Reavers will take their enslaved players. Reaver Camps are located in three different locations: The Outlands, Stobe's Garden, and the edge of The Crags.

Four to six Reaver Whelp, two to twelve Reaver Slave, four Reaver Ironclad, eleven to seventeen Reaver Blooded, and two to four Reaver Neophyte characters can be found in these areas.

properties.title: 黑痕
properties.description:
The town of Black Scratch is situated in the Outlands area. The Great Library in Black Scratch is where most blueprints can be found.

A farm store, a headgear shop, a mechanical shop, a ranger shop, a robotics workshop, a tech hunter bar, a tech hunter shop, the large library, and a waystation are among the buildings and shops.

properties.title: 黑狗总部
properties.description:
Situated in The Outlands, to the west of Black Scratch, is Black Dog HQ, the headquarters of the Black Dog Faction.

The headquarters is a snailhouse with a wall made up of Defensive Wall III and Defensive Gate III. It is illegal to breach the gate or enter the building, which instantly notifies the occupants. The Black Dog faction will be antagonistic toward the player while attacking the locals.

properties.title: 边缘
properties.description:
The United Cities hold power over Brink, a major town.

Lady Tsugi is the local ruler of Brink; if she is killed or abducted, the town would either fall into ruin or be conquered by Reavers.

The structures and stores consist of two pubs, a clothes store, a farm shop, two general storage buildings, a noble house, five old storm houses, four old storm houses that have fallen, a small shanty, a United Cities police station, and a Ronin weapon trader.

properties.title: 农业村
properties.description:
East of Eyesocket or west of Fishing Village on the Stormgap Coast is a little United Cities colony called Farming Village. One of the two outposts in the area that can provide the player with the goods they need to establish a town is the village.

Among the buildings and shops are six residential homes, a farm shop, a travel gear store, and a pub.

properties.title: 邪教村庄
properties.description:
传教士和其信徒居住在邪教村庄。在城墙外耕种土地的农民如果看到守卫抓了俘虏，会说出"血液浸润土壤带来丰收"之类的邪教言论。

任何被击倒的小队成员都会被绑在囚犯柱上，并在几秒钟内被殴打致死，因此建议极其谨慎。

properties.title: 渔村
properties.description: 东海岸上一个小而迷人的渔业社区。

properties.title: 蜘蛛工厂
properties.description: 位于禁忌岛上的蜘蛛工厂是一个既有强大敌人又有珍贵战利品的设施。这座工厂推测是在战争期间建造的，目前是禁忌岛上唯一值得注意的建筑结构。建筑内部有大量的铁蜘蛛，其中一些需要撬锁才能打开。建筑外部聚集着成群的这些攻击性生物，对玩家构成严重威胁。

properties.title: 古代实验室
properties.description: 过去时代的废墟被称为古代实验室。它们现在已成废墟，曾经是高度发达社会的重要组成部分。寻宝者需要小心谨慎，因为这些废墟仍然活跃。废墟中仍然栖息着过去的机械守护者，任何试图从这些实验室中回收失落技术的人都必须与大量安全蜘蛛作战。

properties.title: 旧控制塔
properties.description: The Tower of Abuse and the Ruined Control Tower are to the east of the Old Control Tower. The Scavengers and their leader, Gutterhead, also call it home. Everything has been looted, barring a few small boxes, one of which is a locked wooden chest. According to the Artifacts System, this box may hold treasure in the same way as an Ancient Lab.

properties.title: 废控制塔
properties.description: Waystation Ruins is a place situated in the southeast. It might be where the Freedom Seekers game begins. In addition to Stobe's Garden, Venge has a Waystation Ruins.

properties.title: 中继站废墟
properties.description: Waystation Ruins is a location found in the southeast. It might be where the Freedom Seekers game begins. In addition to Stobe's Garden, Venge has a Waystation Ruins.

properties.title: 中继站
properties.description: Waystations are Minor Outposts controlled by the Tech Hunters.

properties.title: 眼窝
properties.description:
位于风隙海岸地区小山丘上的是眼窝镇。

该地区有几座建筑和商店，如奴隶酒吧、三家奴隶服装店、奴隶商店、奴隶营房和奴隶台。

properties.title: 肠道
properties.description: Gut, which borders the Desert Regions to the east, is well-known for its iron tree patches and blue sand. This is an excellent place to farm animal skins because the main species there is the beak thing.

properties.title: 奇怪营地
properties.description: Situated in the Gut area, Strange Camp is a secluded campsite situated on a small island. Nothing but No-Face lives in this camp. He will assault anyone who ventures into his island because he is a wanted criminal.

properties.title: 失落之镇
properties.description:
Inside the Howler Maze is a sizable ruin known as the Lost Town. Two Megacrabs and numerous crab nests are presently residing there.

There are several buildings in the abandoned town, one of which houses a library with better-quality loot, and there are other places where you could discover mid-low level loot.

properties.title: 嚎叫迷宫
properties.description:
Water-covered land bridges connect the island known as the Howler Maze to the mainland from the north. Heng and Gut are the adjacent regions. It is well known that there are no races living on the island, but crabs rule supreme.

Crabs and Runaway Slaves are examples of spawns.

properties.title: 被洗劫的遗迹
properties.description: Looted Ruins is a Second Empire location on the Howler Maze's northern coast. Except for one abandoned Outpost s-III, this area is made up of a few abandoned structures. Crabs are known to patrol the area, and there might even be a crab nest close by.

properties.title: 无
properties.description:
The Islands of None are situated north of Forbidden Isle and east of Howler Maze.

The islands can only be reached by swimming.

properties.title: 奴隶农场
properties.description:
Heng's Slave Traders rule the town of Slave Farm. This place is largely dependent on slavery. Here, slaves toil on more than 10 XL Cactus Farms.

This is the Noble House where Slave Mistress Ren resides.

A bakery, three slave shops, a slaver bar, an aristocratic mansion, and two little shacks are among the buildings and shops.

properties.title: 恒
properties.description:
Perched atop a rugged crest, Heng is a United Cities community. Situated east of Tengu's Vault or southwest of Heft. The Trader Guild Headquarters is situated atop a metal bridge that connects Heng to Trader's Edge. As a result, it serves as the Empire's principal commerce town and is well-defended.

The Noble House is where you can find Lord Yoshinaga, however it's off limits and trespassing. Many Empire Noble Guard Hooded are positioned to guard him.

properties.title: 浮沙地
properties.description: 随着双方都在守卫该地区，流沙地带成为联合城邦和神圣国度之间的缓冲区。神圣国度在奥克兰之臂上建造了奥克兰之盾和奥克兰之拳等前哨站，以阻止入侵者通过最直接的西进路线。此外，流沙地带还有成群的滑行者，这使得玩家在该区域内移动变得更加困难。

properties.title: 脊椎峡谷
properties.description:
A lengthy series of stony plateaus called Spine Canyon divides the Great Desert from Skimsands. This little area is home to the Bloodraiders and Sand Ninjas, who can be found exploring it. It is also known that skimmers prowl the region.

Among the spawns are Bonedogs, Sand Ninjas, and Bloodraiders.

properties.title: 北方海岸
properties.description:
死猫族和食人族都生活在北海岸沿线。死猫族村庄有两个，但其中一个最近被废弃了。

一些生成的是骨狗。

properties.title: 巴斯特
properties.description: 巴斯特曾经是联合城邦的一部分，现在只剩下废墟。神圣国度最近摧毁了巴斯特。居住在城市废墟中的流浪者是巴斯特唯一的居民。在巴斯特能搜刮到的只有普通物品和垃圾。

properties.title: 存档镇
properties.description: In the Howler Maze, Archive Town is a location from the Second Empire. It is largely made up of ruins, yet there are some intact buildings as well. There might be a crab nest in these structures.

properties.title: 南石营地
properties.description:
The Slave Traders are in charge of the Heng settlement of South Stone Camp. This place is largely dependent on slavery. Here, slaves toil in numerous stone mines.

This is where Slave Master Ruben resides in a Noble House. There will be no South Stone Camp left if Ruben is killed or imprisoned.

properties.title: 衡
properties.description: This is the Traders Guild's home, Heng.

properties.title: 商人之锋
properties.description: 商人边境是联合城市恒领地内的一个社区。尽管商人公会控制着这里，联合城市仍然把守着它的入口。它坐落在邻近恒城的高原上，通过一座金属桥梁相连，这里是商人公会的总部所在地，其指挥官隆根就居住在商人公会总部内。

properties.title: 大沙漠
properties.description: 在大陆北部是巨大而荒凉的大沙漠。虽然在这片沙丘之海中进行农业和村庄建设都不明智，但该地区富含金属和石材矿物。大大小小的加鲁斯兽群和掠行者群构成了这里野生动物的主体，对于小队伍和新手玩家来说，狩猎它们都颇具挑战性。但这些并非此地唯一的风险；这片沙漠是叛逆农民、赏金猎人、奴隶猎人和奴隶贩子的家园。

properties.title: Sinkuun
properties.description:
A sizable peninsula called Sinkun is situated northwest of the Great Desert. The United Cities' outcasts and outlaws are known to reside on the peninsula.

Among the spawns are Rebel Farmers.

properties.title: 暗指
properties.description:
West of Sinkuun is a peninsula known as Darkfinger. Because they originated in this zone, cannibals make up the majority of the population.

In addition to finding Bounties to turn in, players can raid the several Cannibal Villages here to find Raw Meat (assuming they don't care whence it comes from). First Village, at the northernmost point of the peninsula, is home to the 'Unknown' Cannibal Leader.

properties.title: 天狗的藏宝
properties.description: The Samurai of the United Cities stand watch over Tengu's Vault, which is situated at the southernmost point of stony Skimsands. It appears that The Vault is a military jail reserved for the worst of the empire's offenders. The jail is supervised by the Vault Warden.

properties.title: 仙人掌巢穴
properties.description: 沙忍者居住在这座位于脊柱峡谷中心的瞭望塔中，天狗宝库的西北方。此外，他们的指挥官沙忍者鬼也居住在这里。如果你进入这座塔，沙忍者派系将对你产生敌意。

properties.title: 白鼬
properties.description:
位于大沙漠西南部的是联合城市的城镇斯托特，这是进入东部沙漠前的最后一个重要定居点。

在斯托特有一个属于奴隶商人的调停者。

这个城镇的贵族宅邸属于稻叶领主。

properties.title: 赫夫特
properties.description:
作为联合城邦的首都，赫夫特位于大沙漠中。它坐落在恒城东北方，翔巴台东南方，以及斯托特正东方。

太田领主和联合城邦的统治者天狗皇帝居住在赫夫特。

properties.title: 石营
properties.description:
The Slave Traders rule Stone Camp, a settlement located in the Great Desert. This place is largely dependent on slavery. Here, slaves toil in numerous stone mines.

This is where Slave Master Haga resides. This place is destroyed if Haga is killed or imprisoned.

properties.title: 韶拜泰
properties.description:
A major town called Sho-Battai is situated in the center of the Great Desert.

In this village, you can find several unusual friends including Riddly, Jewel, and Izumi. You can usually find a group of United Heroes League characters in a bakery or a tavern.

properties.title: 旧村庄
properties.description: Located on the eastern edge of the Great Desert, Old Village is a deserted settlement that is owned by Empire Peasants. This area is made up of few cactus farms, two storm houses, and a few abandoned buildings.

properties.title: 南港
properties.description: 南港镇由奴隶贩子统治。所有的石矿让这个城镇，即使它被称为"港口"，实际上是一个石料营地。这个贵族宅邸可能是卡娜女士或任何数量的商人公会普通贵族的家。

properties.title: 吠叫
properties.description:
Bark is a town in the Great Desert region located on the northeastern shore. This Noble House is home to Lady Sanda. It's included in the United Cities.

Among the structures and stores are an armory, a general store, a farm shop, a mechanical shop, a tavern, a noble residence, two power plants, a ranger shop, and a slave shop.

properties.title: 幻影堡
properties.description:
Lord Mirage owns a little garrison called Fort Mirage. In addition, nearly 10 City Heroes call it home.

This place does not have any valuable loot. Characters entering City Heroes will be attacked, and if they are defeated, the United Heroes League will turn against the player.

properties.title: 北港
properties.description: The town of Port North is governed by slave traders. All the Stone Mines make this town, even if it's called a "port," actually a Stone Camp. This is a Noble House where Lady Kana resides.

properties.title: 遥远蜂巢村落
properties.description: 西部蜂巢负责管理被称为远方蜂巢村的小型前哨站。辛昆有两个远方蜂巢村。在人口方面，这些地方与蜂巢村相同。

properties.title: 西蒙要塞
properties.description: 反叛农民是沉昆地区的一个派系，占据着西米恩堡垒。这个派系总部是反叛农民领袖西米恩老大的驻地。

properties.title: 遥远的蜂巢村
properties.description: The Western Hive is in charge of the Minor Outpost known as Distant Hive Village. Sinkuun has two Distant Hive Villages. In terms of population, these places are the same as Hive Village.

properties.title: 吉洛斯塔
properties.description:
A tower in Sinkuun known as the Tower of Goats is inhabited entirely by goats. When characters get inside their tower, the goats become hostile.

This is the location of the uncommon Half-Eaten Ancient Science Book. There is also one untouched Ancient Science Book.

properties.title: 堡垒
properties.description: The Cannibal Hunters faction is based at the Bastion. This outpost is located near Bast and shares a border with Sinkuun and Darkfinger. You may find Cannibal Hunter Robun in the Bughouse.

properties.title: 食人族村庄
properties.description:
食人族村庄是食人族为其派系建立的小型前哨站，用作集结区域和休息场所。

这些定居点的主要特征是床铺、帐篷和用于关押囚犯的临时金属棚屋。通常，有许多游荡的食人族小队要么在定居点内睡觉，要么在该区域巡逻。

properties.title: 食人族村庄
properties.description:
食人族村庄是食人族为其派系建立的小型前哨站，用作集结区域和休息场所。

这些定居点的主要特征是床铺、帐篷和用于关押囚犯的临时金属棚屋。通常，有许多游荡的食人族小队要么在定居点内睡觉，要么在该区域巡逻。

properties.title: 失落图书馆
properties.description:
不要与图书馆废墟遗址混淆，失落图书馆是被遗弃腐烂发霉的古老信息来源。偶尔，这些隐藏的宝库中会包含勇敢探险家可以发掘的古代科学文献。

在这些地方经常能找到其他古老遗址的地图，包括前军事设施。

有时，大群血蜘蛛会守卫着它们。

properties.title: 第一个村庄
properties.description: North of Darkfinger lies the location of First Village, a cannibal village. Meat Lord and several other cannibals call it home.

properties.title: 德林
properties.description:
联合城邦被摧毁的城市之一是德林。

联合城邦的门卫仍然会存在，但如果天狗皇帝被杀或被囚禁，圣国将取得德林的主要控制权。

properties.title: 被蹂躏的村庄
properties.description: 一个被神圣国度和联合城邦之间的冲突所摧毁的小镇

properties.title: 荒废小村
properties.description: A little town devastated by the conflict between the Holy Nation and the United Cities

properties.title: 被蹂躏的村庄
properties.description: 一个被神圣国度和联合城邦之间的冲突所摧毁的小镇

properties.title: 荒废小村
properties.description: A little town devastated by the conflict between the Holy Nation and the United Cities

properties.title: 巴斯特
properties.description:
Once part of the United Cities, Bast is now just ruins. The Holy Nation recently destroyed Bast. Squatters residing in the city's ruins are the only inhabitants of Bast. All that's looted in Bast are common stuff and garbage.

For the guy with a dog game start, Bast is also where they start.

properties.title: 被蹂躏的村庄
properties.description: 一个因为圣国与联合城市之间的冲突而被摧毁的小镇

properties.title: 被蹂躏的村庄
properties.description: 一个被神圣国度和联合城邦之间的冲突所摧毁的小镇

properties.title: Endin
properties.description:
The United Cities are in charge of the abandoned city of Endin, which is located in Bast. Currently, the area is home to wandering samurai and peasants.

The storm house, which is the only surviving structure, is frequently inhabited by a few vagrants or exiles from the United Cities. Unless you have a personal animosity towards the United Cities, they are generally innocuous and unlikely to be unfriendly. You and your team are welcome to utilize the beds inside.

properties.title: 被蹂躏的村庄
properties.description: 一个被神圣国度和联合城邦之间的冲突所摧毁的小镇

properties.title: 被蹂躏的村庄
properties.description: 一个被神圣国度和联合城邦之间的冲突所摧毁的小镇

properties.title: 荒废小村
properties.description: A little town devastated by the conflict between the Holy Nation and the United Cities

properties.title: 瞭望塔
properties.description:
A Holy Nation watchtower that was under occupation.

Food, some armor, weapons, and, of course, beds to rest and tend to the injured are all contained there.

properties.title: 奥克兰之拳
properties.description: The Holy Nation controls the fortified stronghold known as Okran's Fist. The garrison is positioned to protect the northeastern entry into Holy Nation territory on the east arm of Okran. The defenders are Holy Sentinels and Paladins.

properties.title: 农场废墟
properties.description:
includes four camp beds that are available for use by participants.

Farm Ruins are places that are usually made up of demolished structures with little to no treasure. In order to give the impression that Kenshi was once a bustling community, these ruined buildings are used as cosmetic world construction.

properties.title: 世界之末
properties.description:
0.93版本更新中包含了一个名为"世界尽头"的新地点。它位于奥克兰之臂的山顶上，在重生东北方向，渔村南方。目前，科技猎人派系将其称为家园。

在科学总部内部保存着许多剑士神话文本。

properties.title: 渔村
properties.description:
North of World's End, Fishing Village is a charming village with piers and shacks along the sea. The Deadcat group is the owner of the town. Goats are generally found in small groups close by. Locals lament the presence of cannibals nearby. Nearby, one can frequently find Flotsam Ninjas and Tech Hunters.

The town has a general item trader's shop, a fish salesman, and a pub.

properties.title: 鬼村
properties.description:
It is implied that cannibals had lately ravaged Ghost Village. The buildings are therefore empty but crammed with stuff. It houses six residences and one bar.

Mega City: The Beginning Series contains the Ghost Village's tale.
